dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
I have been experiencing a productive cough with yellow-green sputum and significant dyspnea for the past four days. I also have a fever of 38.7°C, chills, and right-sided pleuritic chest pain.
Understood. To help me better understand the severity, could you tell me more about the onset and progression of these symptoms over the last four days, particularly the chest pain?
The symptoms began gradually four days ago. The pleuritic chest pain is localized to the right side and intensifies upon deep inspiration.
Thank you for that information. Moving on to allergies, do you have any known drug, food, or environmental allergies?
I have a documented allergy to penicillin, which manifests as a rash. I have no other known drug or food allergies.
[DDX] (Community-acquired pneumonia; Acute exacerbation of COPD; Pulmonary embolism; Congestive heart failure; Pleurisy)
